page_metadata.biotools__summary: Allows users to analyze protein structure families according to the SCOP classification scheme. Users can upload their own protein structures for pair-wise protein structure comparison, structure alignment or symmetry analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Allows users to analyze protein structure families according to the SCOP classification scheme. Users can upload their own protein structures for pair-wise protein structure comparison, structure alignment or symmetry analysis.
